issues.description: Missing condition to check if Leader has {Cross Guild} type. DSL requires 'condition' field with 'LeaderHasType' or 'LeaderHasAnyType' before the action can execute.

Filter uses 'subType' but should use 'type' to match {Cross Guild} type requirement. Also, 'excludeSelf' is not a valid filter property for PlayFromHand; card exclusion should use 'excludeNames' with card name array.
PlayFromHand filter should include 'cardType':'Character' to explicitly match 'Character card' in effect text.
